description: Fix terminal scrollback bleed and broken review screen scrolling

userStories.description: In crates/baro-tui/src/main.rs, after the execute!(tty, EnterAlternateScreen) call on line 116, add a full terminal clear using crossterm::execute!(tty, crossterm::terminal::Clear(crossterm::terminal::ClearType::All)) before creating the CrosstermBackend. This ensures the alternate screen buffer starts clean and scrolling up in the host terminal does not show previous output behind the TUI. Import crossterm::terminal::{Clear, ClearType} at the top of the file (add to the existing crossterm use block).
userStories.title: Fix terminal scrollback bleed on alternate screen entry

userStories.description: In crates/baro-tui/src/app.rs, add a new field review_scroll_offset: u16 to the App struct (in the Review screen section near line 111). Initialize it to 0 in App::new(). Reset it to 0 in show_review(). Update review_next() and review_prev() to also adjust review_scroll_offset: in review_next(), if the selected story would be below the visible area, increment review_scroll_offset (clamped to a reasonable max). In review_prev(), if the selected story would be above the visible area, decrement review_scroll_offset. For simplicity, estimate ~4 lines per story entry. The review_scroll field (selected story index) should remain as-is for tracking which story is highlighted.
userStories.title: Add review_scroll_offset field to App state

userStories.description: In crates/baro-tui/src/screens/review.rs, replace the broken scroll_offset calculation (lines 119-123) that tries to derive offset from review_scroll. Instead, use app.review_scroll_offset directly as the scroll value passed to Paragraph::scroll((app.review_scroll_offset, 0)). Update the ScrollbarState position to also use app.review_scroll_offset so the scrollbar matches the actual scroll position. The max for ScrollbarState should be total_lines.saturating_sub(inner_height), and position should be app.review_scroll_offset as usize. Also update the key handling in main.rs for the Review screen: on Up/Down keys, after calling review_prev()/review_next(), the app should recalculate review_scroll_offset properly. The cleanest approach: make review_next/review_prev take an available_height parameter (passed from the key handler as a reasonable default like 20, or store terminal height in App). Alternatively, keep the offset management simple in review_next/review_prev using the ~4 lines per story estimate.
userStories.title: Wire review_scroll_offset into review screen rendering
